message:
chore: clippy fixes, doc refinements, and beads sync

doctor: Replace if-else chain with match on cmp() for scorecard
confidence shift. Use let-else pattern for fs::read_to_string.
Add #[allow(clippy::useless_let_if_seq)] and #[allow(deprecated)]
where needed. Convert raw string literals to plain strings where
no escapes are present.

trace/file: Use ? operator instead of manual if-let-Err match in
TraceEventIterator::next_compressed refill path.

remote: Fix duplicate doc comment paragraph on IdempotencyStore::check.

pool: Clarify warmup_timeout doc to note it applies to the entire
warmup phase, not each individual create attempt.

beads: Sync issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
